productDisplayName: French Connection Men Brown & Beige Shirt
description: Style NoteUnderstated and stylish, this simplistically designed shirt from french connection is just the thing you wear with a a fitted pair of chinos. We love how it grabs eyeballs without going over the top. Style this with denims and desert boots to add an interesting dimension to your outfitProduct DetailsLight brown checked shirt with a slim button-down collar, has a buttoned patch pocket on the left and right chest, a buttoned placket, long sleeves with double buttoned cuffs and a curved hemMaterial and care100% cottonWash as cottonWash and dry inside outSize and FitRegular FitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18”) is wearing a size M
